sentences.arabic: السُّوقُ القَدِيمُ مَكَانٌ شَهِيرٌ فِي المَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Stara čaršija je poznato mjesto u gradu.
sentences.translationEn: The old souq is a famous place in the city.

sentences.translation: Tu nalaziš začine, odjeću i nakit.
sentences.translationEn: You find spices, clothing, and jewelry there.
Sellers call out to customers loudly.
You can negotiate the price here.

sentences.translation: Tradicionalna čaršija je veoma zanimljivo iskustvo.
sentences.translationEn: The traditional souq is a very enjoyable experience.
